zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Begin_1: $self$眼睛一亮，立刻站了起来：“好啊！我正想露一手呢！”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Begin_2: $self$挽住$target$的胳膊：“这种事怎么能少了我？走走走！”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Begin_3: $self$身体僵硬了一下，低着头默默地走向厨房。“……我知道了。”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Begin_4: $self$不敢看$target$的眼睛，颤抖着声音回答：“好、好的……只要你不生气……”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Begin_5: $self$愣了一下，指着自己：“诶？我也要一起吗？好吧，如果不嫌弃我笨手笨脚的话。”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Begin_6: $self$挠了挠头：“既然你都这么说了……那我就打个下手吧。”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Begin_7: $self$系上围裙，洗净双手，拿出了冷藏箱里的食材。
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Begin_8: $self$哼着不成调的小曲，将平底锅架在了炉火上。
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Begin_9: $self$认真地确认了一遍食谱，深吸一口气：“好，今天要做顿大餐！”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Begin_10: $self$挽起袖子，眼神变得犀利起来。“是时候展现真正的技术了。”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Tryjoin_1: $self$探头探脑地凑进厨房：“好香啊！需不需要帮忙？”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Tryjoin_2: $self$卷起袖子走了进来：“看着很有趣的样子，加我一个呗？”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Joined_1: $self$开心地比了个‘耶’的手势，迅速加入了备菜队伍。
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Joined_2: $self$接过围裙，脸上洋溢着满足的笑容。“那就请多指教啦，大厨！”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Join_Refused_: $self$有些失落地垂下肩膀，嘟囔着退了出去。“什么嘛，小气鬼……”
$self$撇了撇嘴，耸耸肩道：“行行行，不打扰你们二人世界。”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Join_1: $self$用手背把$target$推开，笑道：“这里油烟大，你出去等着吃就好啦。”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Join_2: $self$摇摇头：“不用不用，我已经快搞定啦，你去休息吧。”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Join_3: $self$警惕地护住灶台：“别来添乱！上次厨房差点被你炸了。”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Join_4: $self$皱起眉头：“出去！这里不需要你插手。”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Join_5: $self$往旁边挪了一步，让出位置：“正如我意！快来帮我切洋葱！”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Join_6: $self$把搅拌器递给$target$：“那就拜托你了，我的得力助手。”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Join_7: $self$不敢反抗，默默地让出主厨的位置，退到角落打下手。
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Join_8: $self$低着头，声音细若蚊蝇：“随、随你喜欢……”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Join_9: $self$有些惊讶地眨眨眼：“哎？你想帮忙？稀客啊……那把那个菜洗了吧。”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Join_10: $self$疑惑地打量着$target$：“太阳打西边出来了？行吧，别切到手哦。”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Ongoing_1: 厨房里充满了切菜的笃笃声，空气中开始弥漫起食材的香气。
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Ongoing_2: $self$熟练地颠动着锅铲，额头上渗出细密的汗珠。
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Ongoing_3: $self$正全神贯注地盯着汤锅的火候，时不时用汤勺尝一口味道。
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Ongoing_4: $self$手忙脚乱地在几个灶台间穿梭。“啊！那个酱油在哪里来着？”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Interrupt_1: 看到$target$的身影，$self$的手抖了一下，差点切到了手指。
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Interrupt_2: $self$下意识地往墙角缩了缩，紧紧握住了手中的锅铲作为防御。“你……你要干什么？”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Interrupt_3: $self$手中的菜刀重重地剁在案板上，发出刺耳的声响。“厨房重地，闲人免进。”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Interrupt_4: $self$冷冷地瞥了$target$一眼，侧过身护住了正在料理的食物。“别靠近这里，会弄脏我的菜。”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Interrupt_5: 看到$target$进来，$self$露出了温暖的笑容。“来得正好，帮我尝尝这个味道怎么样？”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Interrupt_6: $self$并没有停下手中的动作，只是愉快地打了声招呼。“稍微等一下哦，马上就好。”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Interrupt_7: $self$脸颊泛红，有些慌乱地整理了一下围裙。“啊，$target$……这副样子被你看到有点害羞。”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Interrupt_8: $self$咬着嘴唇，眼神湿润地看着$target$。“其实……比起做饭，我更想……没、没什么！”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Interrupt_9: $self$只是淡淡地点了点头，继续专注于切菜。
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_Interrupt_10: $self$指了指旁边的椅子。“如果不忙的话，可以坐在那里等。”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_End_1: $self$笑着摆摆手：“抱歉啦，我今天是'只吃不洗'派。”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_End_2: $self$指了指正在追的电视剧：“等我看完这集？在那之前还是饶了我吧。”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_End_3: $self$翻了个白眼：“你看我像是会做饭的样子吗？”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_End_4: $self$不耐烦地转过身去：“没空，自己叫外卖去。”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_End_5: $self$骄傲地端出成品，香气四溢。“当当当当！完美！快夸我！”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_End_6: $self$看着大家满足的吃相，露出了欣慰的笑容。“太好了，看来努力没有白费。”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_End_7: 虽然料理很完美，但$self$只是疲惫地解下围裙。“太累了……下次还是叫外卖吧。”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_End_8: $self$冷淡地看着桌上的大餐，似乎完全没有食欲。“做完了，你们吃吧，我去休息。”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_End_9: 看着这一团焦黑的物体，$self$忍不住笑出了声。“虽然看起来很惨，但过程还挺开心的嘛！”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_End_10: $self$擦了擦脸上的面粉，对$target$做了个鬼脸。“这就是传说中的黑暗料理！下次我们会做得更好的！”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_End_11: $self$颓废地坐在地上，看着一片狼藉的厨房。“搞砸了……彻底搞砸了。”
zh-cn.com_job_production_cooking_End_12: $self$把失败的料理倒进垃圾桶，眼眶有些发红。“我想静一静，别理我。”
zh-cn.kojo_default_com_job_production_cooking_: $self$：“完了，盐放太多了！要不还是吃泡面吧……”
$self$：“呼…总算按着菜谱一步一步做出来了”
$self$：“完成了！嗯，至少外观是对的……希望味道别太奇怪。”

en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Begin_1: $self$'s eyes lit up as she stood up immediately: "Alright! I was just thinking of showing off my skills!"
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Begin_2: $self$ grabbed $target$'s arm: "How could I miss this? Let's go, let's go!"
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Begin_3: $self$'s body stiffened, and she walked silently toward the kitchen with her head down. "...I understand."
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Begin_4: $self$ didn't dare to look $target$ in the eyes, replying with a trembling voice: "O-Okay... as long as you're not angry..."
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Begin_5: $self$ paused, pointing at herself: "Eh? Me too? Well, if you don't mind my clumsiness."
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Begin_6: $self$ scratched her head: "Since you put it that way... I'll just be your assistant then."
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Begin_7: $self$ put on an apron, washed her hands, and took out the ingredients from the fridge.
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Begin_8: $self$ hummed an out-of-tune melody as she placed the frying pan on the stove.
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Begin_9: $self$ seriously checked the recipe again and took a deep breath: "Alright, time to cook a feast today!"
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Begin_10: $self$ rolled up her sleeves, her gaze sharpening. "It's time to show some real skills."
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Tryjoin_1: $self$ peeked into the kitchen curiously: "Smells good! Need any help?"
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Tryjoin_2: $self$ rolled up her sleeves and walked in: "Looks fun, count me in?"
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Joined_1: $self$ happily made a 'V' sign and quickly joined the prep team.
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Joined_2: $self$ took the apron, a satisfied smile on her face. "Please take care of me then, Chef!"
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Join_Refused_: $self$'s shoulders slumped in disappointment as she muttered and backed out. "Tch, stingy..."
$self$ pouted and shrugged: "Fine, fine, I won't disturb your alone time."
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Join_1: $self$ pushed $target$ away with the back of her hand, laughing: "It's smoky here, just go wait outside and eat later."
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Join_2: $self$ shook her head: "No need, no need, I'm almost done. Go rest."
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Join_3: $self$ vigilantly guarded the stove: "Don't cause trouble! You almost blew up the kitchen last time."
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Join_4: $self$ frowned: "Get out! I don't need your interference here."
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Join_5: $self$ moved aside, making room: "Just what I wanted! Come help me chop the onions!"
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Join_6: $self$ handed the mixer to $target$: "I'll leave it to you then, my capable assistant."
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Join_7: $self$ didn't dare to resist, silently giving up the chef's spot and retreating to the corner to help.
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Join_8: $self$ lowered her head, her voice as faint as a mosquito: "Whatever... whatever you like..."
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Join_9: $self$ blinked in surprise: "Eh? You want to help? That's rare... well, go wash those vegetables."
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Join_10: $self$ looked at $target$ doubtfully: "Did the sun rise from the west? Fine, just don't cut your fingers."
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Ongoing_1: The kitchen was filled with the chopping sound, and the aroma of ingredients began to permeate the air.
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Ongoing_2: $self$ skillfully tossed the spatula, beads of sweat forming on her forehead.
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Ongoing_3: $self$ was intently watching the soup pot, occasionally tasting it with a spoon.
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Ongoing_4: $self$ scrambled between several stoves. "Ah! Where was that soy sauce again?"
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Interrupt_1: Seeing $target$, $self$'s hand shook, almost cutting her finger.
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Interrupt_2: $self$ subconsciously shrank into the corner, tightly gripping the spatula in self-defense. "What... what do you want?"
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Interrupt_3: $self$ slammed the kitchen knife onto the chopping board with a harsh sound. "Kitchen area, authorized personnel only."
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Interrupt_4: $self$ gave $target$ a cold glance, turning sideways to shield the food being cooked. "Stay away, you'll contaminate my dish."
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Interrupt_5: Seeing $target$ enter, $self$ showed a warm smile. "Just in time, come taste this for me?"
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Interrupt_6: $self$ didn't stop her movements, just greeting happily. "Wait a moment, it'll be ready soon."
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Interrupt_7: $self$'s cheeks flushed red, and she flusteredly adjusted her apron. "Ah, $target$... it's a bit embarrassing to be seen like this by you."
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Interrupt_8: $self$ bit her lip, looking at $target$ with moist eyes. "Actually... rather than cooking, I'd prefer to... n-nothing!"
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Interrupt_9: $self$ just nodded lightly, continuing to focus on chopping vegetables.
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_Interrupt_10: $self$ pointed to the nearby chair. "If you're not busy, you can sit there and wait."
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_End_1: $self$ waved her hand with a laugh: "Sorry, I'm on the 'eat only, no wash' team today."
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_End_2: $self$ pointed at the TV series she was watching: "Wait until I finish this episode? Please spare me until then."
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_End_3: $self$ rolled her eyes: "Do I look like someone who cooks?"
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_End_4: $self$ turned away impatiently: "No time, order takeout yourself."
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_End_5: $self$ proudly brought out the finished product, the aroma overflowing. "Ta-da! Perfect! Praise me quickly!"
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_End_6: $self$ looked at everyone's satisfied eating faces with a relieved smile. "Great, seems the effort wasn't in vain."
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_End_7: Although the dish was perfect, $self$ just wearily took off her apron. "Too tired... let's just order takeout next time."
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_End_8: $self$ looked coldly at the feast on the table, seeming to have no appetite. "It's done. You guys eat, I'm going to rest."
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_End_9: Looking at the burnt mess, $self$ couldn't help but laugh out loud. "It looks miserable, but the process was fun!"
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_End_10: $self$ wiped the flour off her face and made a funny face at $target$. "This is the legendary dark cuisine! We'll do better next time!"
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_End_11: $self$ sat on the floor dejectedly, looking at the messy kitchen. "Ruined... completely ruined."
en-us.com_job_production_cooking_End_12: $self$ dumped the failed dish into the trash can, her eyes turning red. "I want to be alone, don't talk to me."
en-us.kojo_default_com_job_production_cooking_: $self$: "God no, I put too much salt! I should probably serve instant noodles instead..."
$self$: "Phew… finally made it step by step according to the recipe。"
$self$: "Finished! Hmm, at least it has the right looks… hope it also taste right."
